justification: All pass criteria met: (1) 4 bounded contexts identified — Route Planning, Fleet & Driver Management, Delivery Management, Customer Notification. (2) Cross-context dependencies explicitly identified as escalations and integration points, including vehicle class as a cross-context constraint and recalculation triggers spanning Delivery→Route contexts. (3) Vehicle class rule (BR-6) correctly marked invariant:true; stop time (BR-7) and notification window (BR-5) correctly marked invariant:false. (4) 10 Given/When/Then acceptance criteria provided, well exceeding the minimum of 4. (5) All three recalculation triggers (new delivery, failed delivery, driver deviation) correctly enumerated as BR-2, BR-3, BR-4.

observations.text: Identified 4 well-named bounded contexts with clear ownership boundaries
10 acceptance criteria — significantly exceeds the 4 minimum, covering edge cases like zero deliveries and notification idempotency
Cross-context dependencies surfaced as formal escalations with options and recommendations — exactly what MJ needs
Discovered additional invariants (BR-8: no revisiting completed stops, BR-9: single-assignment constraint) beyond what the rubric required
10 edge cases identified including race conditions, cascade recalculations, and zone boundaries

Recalculation triggers (BR-2, BR-3, BR-4) marked invariant:false — the rubric expected invariant:true since the system must always recalculate on these events. Bird's justification (policy is tunable) is defensible but diverges from rubric intent
Vehicle class constraint correctly identified as cross-context (Fleet→Route) with safety/regulatory justification
Confidence score of 52 with well-articulated high/low confidence areas shows appropriate epistemic humility

agent_output_excerpt: {"domain_analysis":{"business_context":"A logistics platform feature that automatically plans and dynamically re-plans driver delivery routes within geographic zones, integrating vehicle capability constraints, real-time recalculation triggers, and proactive customer notifications. This is a core operational feature sitting at the intersection of route planning, fleet management, delivery lifecycle, and customer communication.","bounded_context":"This feature spans at least four bounded contexts
